name: Web Search
description: Searches DuckDuckGo and returns the top results
author: AgentOS

steps.command: $query = 'latest AI news'; $encoded = [Uri]::EscapeDataString($query); $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.duckduckgo.com/?q=$encoded&format=json&no_html=1"; Write-Output "Query: $query"; $response.RelatedTopics | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Text }
